rationale: In the citing paper, Ailawadi et al. (2006) appears only in the discussion section as an example that many conventional promotions can be unprofitable for retailers. The citation provides contextual support for a managerial implication about reward-point promotions, but it is not used to develop hypotheses, define core constructs, or shape the empirical model. There is no clear methodological or theoretical dependence on this specific cited paper in the main analysis.
